career_monitor.notes: Waymo Director of Engineering, London Site Lead (Simulator Team) is new. All other 12 boards had 0 new exec eng roles.

jsearch_la.notes: ATMAE VP Eng ($217-300K, below threshold), WSP civil eng, PTR Global (staffing/dealbreaker), Thiozen (climate tech, small), VirtualVocations (aggregator), STV (civil), OakTree SVP Data Eng (data eng domain mismatch)

jsearch_london.notes: Aisel Health (pre-funding startup, rejected prior), Apply4U Campaign Platform (ad delivery mismatch), BlackRock/Goldman/JPMorgan/Citi banking VP titles, Elsevier/RELX (rejected prior for £63K)

jsearch_singapore.notes: Confidential Solutions Eng (sales-facing), GIC AVP Data Eng (data eng domain), APJ Partner Solution Eng (sales), Cronos (crypto dealbreaker x2), Snowflake Partner Solution Eng (sales), Aspire Lifestyles (concierge), GIC Platform Eng (ESM/IT), Goldman Sachs (banking VP)

jsearch_tokyo.notes: Zero results as expected for Tokyo exec eng queries via JSearch.

adzuna_uk.notes: All below £160K threshold: RELX £63K, BlackRock £77-129K, Citi £71-74K, Portfolio Group £150K, Reed £120-150K. Most are banking VP titles (BlackRock, Citi, Citigroup).

adzuna_de.notes: Aiven AE (sales), Affinidi Director of Engineering (small/Web3-adjacent - rejected prior).

adzuna_au.notes: Zero results for VP Engineering Sydney.

adzuna_au_cto.notes: Latitude IT Head of Eng/CTO (57 employees, below 200 min, rejected prior), BLUEBIRD/Antares/Optiver (rejected prior), Garvan (non-eng), mostly solutions architect, sales, customer success. Sierra Software Eng role not leadership level.

mcf_cto.notes: All previously seen/filtered: BIENE, NodeFlair, Manpower (staffing), GlobalTix, Kaneze, Randstad, Libeara, Oriental Remedies (x2), ChemOne, Peak Ocean, ST Engineering. All below comp threshold or wrong domain.

mcf_vp.notes: FNDR VP Eng at SGD 5,500-20K (below threshold, small startup — rejected prior).

websearch_target_companies.notes: No new qualifying roles at OpenAI, Anthropic, Google (India-based), Microsoft, Apple, Disney, Netflix, Sony, LinkedIn, Uber, Snap, Stripe, Airbnb, Spotify. Salesforce VP roles surfaced but SRE domain mismatch or India-based. Ashby/Greenhouse board search surfaced only small startups (Wispr Flow, Inorsa, Bjak).

websearch_tokyo_europe.notes: SyntheticGestalt (Tokyo) previously seen. No new qualifying leads in Amsterdam, Berlin, Zurich, Dublin. European exec AI market at target companies is dormant.

jobs.title: Director of Engineering, London Site Lead
jobs.summary: Lead Waymo's London site as Director of Engineering over the Simulator Team (ML engineers, software engineers, data scientists building state-of-the-art simulations for the Waymo Driver). Requirements: proven track record leading large engineering organizations in research-driven environments, deep ML/generative foundation models expertise, PhD/Masters in CS/ML/Robotics.
